block.text: You may take one of these robots if you like (there are many here). If you take one and leave, turn to 376. Or, if you would prefer a tank robot instead, turn to 247. 169 You must fight the enemy robots. There are two Of them, both Tripod Robots. These speedy machines walk about on three legs; they have metal tentacle arms that can carry guns or other devices. You recognize them as handling-machines belonging to the fuel plant. The Karosseans have taken them over as guard robots! You must fight them both at

choice.text: If you take one and leave.
. Or, if you would prefer a tank robot instead.
